items.title: Hive 宣布與加拿大貝爾公司和 Cohere 簽訂價值 2.2 億美元、為期三年的 GPU 雲端合同，以比特幣挖礦為中心，其股價在盤前交易中上漲 10% (James Van Straten/CoinDesk) / Hive stock jumps 10% in premarket trading after announcing a $220M, three-year GPU cloud contract with Bell Canada and Cohere, as it pivots from bitcoin mining (James Van Straten/CoinDesk)
